title: Gudekote Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Gudekote Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Karnataka

overview.short: Gudekote Sloth Bear Sanctuary is located in Ballari district in Karnataka, India.
overview.description: Gudekote Sloth Bear Sanctuary is located in Ballari district in Karnataka, India. It is spread over 38.48 km2 (14.86 sq mi). The sanctuary was created exclusively for the preservation of the Indian sloth bear (Melursus ursinus) and is Asia's second sloth bear sanctuary, the first being Daroji Sloth Bear Sanctuary. In November 2013, the Government of Karnataka, declared 3848.84 hectares of the Gudekote Forest Reserve (Block A), Gudekote Extension Forest Reserve (Block A) and Halsagara Reserve Forests as Gudekote Sloth Bear Sanctuary vide Gazette Notification FEE 72 FWL 2013, issued on 11 Novemb

topPlaces.name: Daroji Sloth Bear Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Daroji Sloth Bear Sanctuary is located in Ballari district in Karnataka. This is Asia's first sloth bear sanctuary.

topPlaces.name: Kamalapura, Vijayanagara
topPlaces.description: Kamalapura (also Kamalapur and Kamalapuram) is a panchayat town in Vijayanagara district in Karnataka. It is located near the industrial city of Hosapete, and lies within the ruins of the old city of Vijayanagara, just outside the original 'Royal Centre'.

items.note: Daroji Sloth Bear Sanctuary is located in Ballari district in Karnataka. This is Asia's first sloth bear sanctuary.

Kamalapura (also Kamalapur and Kamalapuram) is a panchayat town in Vijayanagara district in Karnataka. It is located near the industrial city of Hosapete, and lies within the ruins of the old city of Vijayanagara, just outside the original 'Royal Centre'.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gudekote Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gudekote Wildlife Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gudekote Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Bellary Airport (40 km) and the nearest railway station is Hubballi Junction (149 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gudekote Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gudekote Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gudekote Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Gudekote Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gudekote Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Daroji Sloth Bear Sanctuary, Kamalapura, Vijayanagara.
